tasks.title: WeAreSwarm Kids Agent Planner MVP
tasks.objective:
Ship a kid-safe, static MVP planner at weareswarm.online/kids-planner/ so Aria and Charlie
can claim tasks, clock work, generate agent prompts, and log results — all in localStorage with
no backend or secrets. Parents review work via parent_review status on work logs.
tasks.kid_instructions:
Open Kids Planner, pick your name, claim an approved task, generate the agent prompt,
paste it into your agent chat, then save what happened in the work log.
tasks.public_summary: Kids Agent Planner MVP — kid-safe task kanban with agent prompt generation on weareswarm.online.

agent_prompt_template.PROJECT: WeAreSwarm Kids Agent Planner on weareswarm.online
agent_prompt_template.TASK: Verify real Swarm tasks and prompt generation
agent_prompt_template.OBJECTIVE: Confirm exported kid-safe tasks load, claim works, and generated prompts match the task YAML.
agent_prompt_template.RULES:
- Make small safe changes.
- Do not delete unrelated files.
- Do not touch secrets.
- Explain errors clearly.
- After each step, tell the kid what happened.
- End with: Files Changed, Verification, Next Step.
agent_prompt_template.ACTION: Walk through claim → generate prompt → copy → work log on one exported task.
agent_prompt_template.VERIFY: Live JSON has no secrets; prompt includes PROJECT, TASK, OBJECTIVE, RULES, ACTION, VERIFY, CLOSEOUT.
agent_prompt_template.CLOSEOUT: Paste a short kid summary into the work log for parent review.

tasks.title: Use projectscanner analysis to drive Dream.OS deduplication
tasks.objective:
Convert projectscanner project_analysis output into a Dream.OS authority graph and cleanup manifest.
This makes deduplication evidence-driven instead of folder-by-folder guessing.
tasks.kid_instructions:
Help review the deduplication report. Confirm no delete actions are listed — read-only
analysis only. Ask a parent before any cleanup.
tasks.public_summary: Projectscanner will convert project analysis into a deduplication authority graph and cleanup manifest.

agent_prompt_template.TASK: Build authority graph from project analysis
agent_prompt_template.OBJECTIVE: Convert project_analysis into authority graph and cleanup manifest with zero deletes executed.
agent_prompt_template.RULES:
- Make small safe changes.
- Do not delete unrelated files.
- Do not touch secrets.
- Explain errors clearly.
- After each step, tell the kid what happened.
- End with: Files Changed, Verification, Next Step.
agent_prompt_template.ACTION: Run analysis pipeline; verify manifest JSON files exist and contain classification buckets only.
agent_prompt_template.CLOSEOUT: Paste how many duplicate candidates were found (summary only).

tasks.title: Import Kids Planner work logs into DreamVault proof reports
tasks.objective:
Convert Kids Planner JSON/CSV work-log exports into public-safe DreamVault proof reports
under data/reports/kids_planner/ for parent review, closeout feed handoff, and archive.
tasks.kid_instructions: Read the objective. Ask a parent if unsure. Use Generate Prompt before pasting into your agent.
tasks.public_summary: DreamVault proof import for Kids Planner work-log exports.

agent_prompt_template.TASK: Import Kids Planner work logs into DreamVault proof reports
agent_prompt_template.OBJECTIVE:
Convert Kids Planner JSON/CSV work-log exports into public-safe DreamVault proof reports
under data/reports/kids_planner/ for parent review, closeout feed handoff, and archive.
agent_prompt_template.RULES:
- Make small safe changes.
- Do not delete unrelated files.
- Do not touch secrets.
- Explain errors clearly.
- After each step, tell the kid what happened.
- End with: Files Changed, Verification, Next Step.
agent_prompt_template.ACTION: Help the kid complete this objective step by step: DreamVault proof import for Kids Planner work-log exports.
agent_prompt_template.CLOSEOUT: Return a short report the kid can paste into the work log.

tasks.title: Add controller animation layer
tasks.objective: Add a reusable no-framework animation and transition layer for Dream.OS controller pages.
tasks.kid_instructions:
Ask your agent to add subtle CSS animations to the operator dashboard. Review the
fade and pulse effects in the browser with a parent before saving.
tasks.public_summary: Kid-safe CSS animation layer for Dream.OS controller pages — fade, slide, pulse, glow.

agent_prompt_template.OBJECTIVE: Add subtle CSS animation tokens and a tiny JS helper; respect prefers-reduced-motion.
agent_prompt_template.RULES:
- Make small safe changes.
- Do not delete unrelated files.
- Do not touch secrets.
- Explain errors clearly.
- After each step, tell the kid what happened.
- End with: Files Changed, Verification, Next Step.
agent_prompt_template.ACTION: Implement animation tokens, wire transition states, run build_operator_dashboard_html.py.
agent_prompt_template.VERIFY: grep confirms dreamos-animation-layer and prefers-reduced-motion in output HTML.
agent_prompt_template.CLOSEOUT: Paste a short kid summary of which animations were added.

tasks.title: Add dream task compile/run/report commands
tasks.objective: Add dream task compile, run, and report CLI commands for local task runner.
tasks.kid_instructions:
Watch your agent wire up dream task commands. Try compile/run/report on the echo
example task with a parent nearby.
tasks.public_summary: Add dream task compile, run, and report CLI commands for local task runner.

agent_prompt_template.OBJECTIVE: Extend dream entrypoint with task subcommands calling local task runner scripts.
agent_prompt_template.RULES:
- Make small safe changes.
- Do not delete unrelated files.
- Do not touch secrets.
- Explain errors clearly.
- After each step, tell the kid what happened.
- End with: Files Changed, Verification, Next Step.
agent_prompt_template.ACTION: Wire compile, run, and report subcommands; verify against example_echo_001.yaml.
agent_prompt_template.VERIFY: dream task compile/run/report succeed on example task.
agent_prompt_template.CLOSEOUT: Paste which commands work and one test output line.

tasks.title: Build autonomous runtime foundation manifest
tasks.objective: Consolidate the newly completed autonomous runtime orchestration work into a single resumable manifest for future agents and promotion review.
tasks.kid_instructions:
Help your agent write a clear manifest listing what the autonomous runtime can do.
Read the summary aloud to a parent when done.
tasks.public_summary: Document autonomous runtime capabilities in a resumable manifest for future agents.

agent_prompt_template.OBJECTIVE: Consolidate orchestration work into a single resumable manifest.
agent_prompt_template.RULES:
- Make small safe changes.
- Do not delete unrelated files.
- Do not touch secrets.
- Explain errors clearly.
- After each step, tell the kid what happened.
- End with: Files Changed, Verification, Next Step.
agent_prompt_template.ACTION: Draft manifest sections for planner_cli, task_runner, resume, and governance persistence.
agent_prompt_template.VERIFY: Manifest markdown exists under data/reports/ and lists included/excluded scope.
agent_prompt_template.CLOSEOUT: Paste a kid summary of what the runtime can do now.

prompt_template_hint.intro: You are an agent working under a kid project manager.
prompt_template_hint.kid_manager: The kid will supervise you. Use simple explanations.
